history.title: James Harvey (artist)
history.description: "From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedianavigation search James Harvey (1929 – July 15, 1965) was an American commercial and fine artist who was best known as the designer of the Brillo Pad box made famous by pop artist Andy Warhol in 1964 at his "" Stable Gallery Show "". During his successful career
